snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Copytrading App at http://bit.ly/JumpCuts_OctaFX and get an exclusive 50% bonus! 🎁 Start earning extra money with the official trading partner of the Delhi Capitals - OctaFX🏆

It's Vishal's birthday, and he's waiting for his friends to party with them at his place. Unfortunately, his father wants to take him to the temple and seek blessing. His friends have kept the beer bottle in the car dicky. 

Now, how will Vishal manage his conversations with his friends while driving? His phone is connected to the car's Bluetooth. Will his father discover the beer bottles and his friends' surprise?

Now, watch "Bluetooth - Technology Tragedy" and find out more. Watch Jump Cuts Tamil video featuring Hari and Naresh.

snippet.title: They discharged me from the hospital - Part 2
snippet.description:
Thank you for sending me all your overwhelming love and support. While I was miserable, one of the few things that cracked a smile on my face was interacting with you all through this vlog. Thank you for getting my mind off of things. 
Thank you for giving me the strength to carry on, no matter what, through the kind words you expressed in the comments. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for always having my back. I don’t think I can ever hope to repay you. 

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

#ThankYouMakkale #StaySafe #IamBack

snippet.description:
மே 6 முதல் அரசு அறிவித்த 20 முக்கிய கட்டுப்பாடுகள் | Tamil Nadu Extends Lockdown Till May 20
#LockdownExtends #TNLockdown #SathiyamNews

மே 6 முதல் மளிகை, காய்கறிக் கடைகள் நண்பகல் 12 மணி வரை மட்டுமே இயங்க அனுமதி: தமிழக அரசு அறிவிப்பு
நோய்த்தொற்று அறிகுறிகள் தென்பட்டவுடன், பொதுமக்கள் உடனே அருகிலுள்ள மருத்துவமனைகளை நாடி மருத்துவ ஆலோசனை / சிகிச்சை பெற வேண்டும். பொதுமக்கள் அரசின் முயற்சிகளுக்கு முழு ஒத்துழைப்பு நல்க வேண்டுமென அரசு கேட்டுக் கொள்கிறது”.

Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: Couples In YOYO Rooms || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
Play with champions & win big prizes! Download My11Circle app now to get Rs. 1500 joining bonus & exclusive 20% extra cash. Hurry, make your team now: https://www.my11circle.com/influencer-com.html?utm_source=m1c_IM_Direct_Adziny&utm_medium=video_20cb&utm_campaign=YT_Influencer_IND_5052021&utm_content=Nazarbattu

When you are planning a trip, the first thing came to our mind is hotel room booking. A hotel room is an integral part of a trip.
But what couples expect from a hotel room when they visit a hotel. In this video, we are showing Indian couples in a Hotel room.
We have presented types of people who visit hotels, what are their demands, what do they want from their rooms. People use the room
for various purposes. How hotel staff behaves when they see an unmarried couple, how they try to overcharge them, and what excuses visitors
give to stay at the hotel.
When a married couple visits hotel, they look for a comfortable stay. People also look for hidden cameras in hotels so that no one can
breach their privacy. Some people steal stuff from the room. Sometimes police raids the hotel and some people get caught.
Like these, there are many funny incidents we put together in a video.
Hope you enjoy the video and share it with your friends. Thanks for watching.

en.title: Couples In YOYO Rooms || Nazarbattu
en.description:
Play with champions & win big prizes! Download My11Circle app now to get Rs. 1500 joining bonus & exclusive 20% extra cash. Hurry, make your team now: https://www.my11circle.com/influencer-com.html?utm_source=m1c_IM_Direct_Adziny&utm_medium=video_20cb&utm_campaign=YT_Influencer_IND_5052021&utm_content=Nazarbattu

When you are planning a trip, the first thing came to our mind is hotel room booking. A hotel room is an integral part of a trip.
But what couples expect from a hotel room when they visit a hotel. In this video, we are showing Indian couples in a Hotel room.
We have presented types of people who visit hotels, what are their demands, what do they want from their rooms. People use the room
for various purposes. How hotel staff behaves when they see an unmarried couple, how they try to overcharge them, and what excuses visitors
give to stay at the hotel.
When a married couple visits hotel, they look for a comfortable stay. People also look for hidden cameras in hotels so that no one can
breach their privacy. Some people steal stuff from the room. Sometimes police raids the hotel and some people get caught.
Like these, there are many funny incidents we put together in a video.
Hope you enjoy the video and share it with your friends. Thanks for watching.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

snippet.title: Jagame Thandhiram - Teaser
snippet.description:
Netflix Presents “Jagame Thandhiram”
A YNOT Studios & Reliance Entertainment Production. 
A Suruli 2019 Film Limited Production.

Starring Dhanush, James Cosmo, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Kalaiyarasan, Joju George and others.

Written & Directed by Karthik Subbaraj

Produced by S. Sashikanth
Co-Produced by Chakravarthy Ramachandra

Music - Santhosh Narayanan
DOP - Shreyaas Krishna
Art Directors - T. Santanam, Vinoth Rajkumar (UK)
Editor - Vivek Harshan
Lyrics : Vivek, Poetu Dhanush, Arivu, Anthony Dasan & Madurai Babaraj
Stunts - Dinesh Subbarayan
Choreography - M Sherif, Baba Baskar
Line Producers - Muthuramalingam, Sudipto Sarkar (UK)
Production Executive - Rangaraj
Sound Design - Kunal Rajan
Sound Mix - M R Rajakrishnan
Costume Design - Praveen Raja 
Chief Make-Up Artist - A Sabari Girison
Costumer - Subier
DI & VFX - Accel Media
DI Colorist - Suresh Ravi
Publicity Design - Tuney John (24AM)
Publicity Stills - V S Anandhakrishna
Stills - Murugan
PRO - Nikkil

YNOT - Head of Distribution - Kishore Tallur
YNOT - Head of Operations - Pranav Rajkumar

Direction Team - Bala, Purushoth, Bharath, Dhakshi, Karthik, Shylam, Vigneswaran, Jagadish, Somitharan, Praveen, Srinivasan & Suresh

♬♬ Music On - Sony Music Entertainment

snippet.title: Starship | SN15 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, May 5, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 15 (SN15) – our fifth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. SN15 has vehicle improvements across structures, avionics and software, and the engines that will allow more speed and efficiency throughout production and flight: specifically, a new enhanced avionics suite, updated propellant architecture in the aft skirt, and a new Raptor engine design and configuration. 

Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN15 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN15 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN15’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s fifth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN15’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s fifth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

en.title: Starship | SN15 | High-Altitude Flight Test
en.description:
As early as Wednesday, May 5, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 15 (SN15) – our fifth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. SN15 has vehicle improvements across structures, avionics and software, and the engines that will allow more speed and efficiency throughout production and flight: specifically, a new enhanced avionics suite, updated propellant architecture in the aft skirt, and a new Raptor engine design and configuration. 

Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN15 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN15 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN15’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s fifth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

 अब रजिस्टर करें a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.description:

Song : Jatt De Khilaaf
Singer : Raji Ft. Gurlez Akhtar

Asst. Dop : Harinder Singh
Directed By : Preet Bal
Social Media Promotions : HOT (Hub Of Talent)
Produced By : Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu

Lyrics :


Teri oo brabari ae chaunde karna
Syllabus aukha ae zindagi da padna
Oh pinda wali had jihne tappi ni kade
Ni ohi sale chaunde mere moohre khadna
Hale 1 hi step agge vadhya ae jatt
Ho jari jandi ni taraki ae ta saaf hogya
Ho teri rees naio hundi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ho teri rees naio hundi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ni billo ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya

Ve sunya si raula sarpanchi time da
Lana pihdiya to karda ilaj veham da
Kehnde aam naio bande jede naal tere aa
Jithe hath naio peinda dass kaam kehde aa
Ve tera level ae high tere kamm vadde aa
Pyar dil ch te vair mind cho na kadde aa
Dekh luxury cara veiry laat marde
Ho kiti mehnat ae babbe moohre hath adde aa
Jede chad gaye si tainu mada time dekh ke
Chad gaye si tainu mada time dekh ke
Oh hun ohna lai ta jatt kude khaab hogya
Ho teri rees naio hundi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ho teri rees naio hundi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ni billo ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya

Ve sekhon sekhon jatta tu krai pai ae
Ni uthi kal di langaud khoonje lai pai ae
Jede rehnde naal ohi lattan khich de
Oh picho rosso di jutti te taiyo tange disde
Ve duniya ae tedi kise samaj na aai
Jihdi dhoun utte goda ohi kare bai bai
Veh raati pind deitwal fire hoye si
Oh chadi jatta ch jawani kude honi ghutt lai
Ve tu vi talda ni jatta machde machauna ae
Talda ni jatta machde machauna ae
Oh billo tuhi dass edda kehda paap hogya
Ho teri rees naio honi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ve teri rees naio honi jihde kolo jatta veh
Ni ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya
Ni billo ohi sala jatt de khilaaf hogya

snippet.title: Pollard enters the dressing room after epic MI vs CSK chase | एमआइ बनाम सीऐसके | IPL 2021
snippet.description:
Become a part of MI One Family. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the notifications icon.

Watch Kieron Pollard enter the Mumbai Indians dressing after playing a crucial part in the team's successful chase against the Chennai Super Kings during the IPL 2021 in Delhi. Polly was handy with the ball picking 2 wickets as well as destructive with the bat as he hit an unbeaten 87*. Check out what he had to say and how the team congratulated in this post-match dressing room team reaction.

snippet.title: Vanathai Pola - Promo | 06 May 2021 | Sun TV Serial | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #VanathaiPola that airs on Sun TV.
 
Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th May 2021
 
 Vanathai Pola is a family drama serial on Sun TV. Chinraasu, a compassionate villager, loved by the whole village and Thulasi, a cheerful & fun-loving young girl are siblings who can go to any lengths for each other. They lose their parents at a very young age and raised by their grandmother. Follow this unique story about the sibling bond shared by Chinraasu and Thulasi, as they stand by each other, while finding love & joy in the trials of life.

snippet.title: The Pet Peeves Song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Our first ever MUSIC VIDEO lol !
Stay tuned for our behind the scenes video dropping next week!
► Thanks for subscribing! - http://bit.ly/SubDudePerfect

Song Writer: Ben Rogers
Vocals: Dude Perfect
Song Mixer: Aaron Kelley
Song produced at: Luminous Sound, Dallas TX
-------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
Dude Perfect -- Yas Yas – haha
Why are you talking like that?
Recording a lit video, bro – A song about Pet Peeves, brah
That’s interesting because my #1 pet peeve is people overusing bro and brah
I hear you brah… but Pet Peeves are makin my life a grind, bro
You’re actually grindin on my nerves, like right now
 
Man, listen… I’mma break it down with precision
The mission, is to expose pet peeve conditions
I’ll list em, like couples, who over-say bae
Or people goin around saying that’s cray cray
 
And I gotta be honest -- I was really hopin
You could stop eating with your mouth wide open
And try Scopin, please back up off me
Breath smellin like burnt dog poop and coffee
 
And stop these, baby-name catastrophes
Like Ransom, Melanomia and ABCDE
And I’m sick of passin these dogs that bark a lot
Why are you leaving grocery carts in a parkin lot?
 
And whether it’s dark or not, why oh why oh why oh why
Are you takin TWO parkin spots?
Cause you’re drivin nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much

CHORUS
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life, my life, my life, OH
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
A grind, a grind, a grind, a grind OH

It happens every day, why must it be this way?
Another couple throwin down excessive PDA
And what am I supposed to do? 
It always lights my fuse
When I squeeze mustard, but all I get is mustard juice
 
Dude Perfect. Listen up, it will be worth it.
I can’t stand it when pet peeves surface
Like opening a cereal bag and it explodes
Or no toilet paper over by the commode
 
Or someone breaking the code, of eatin food off my plate
They didn’t order no fries, but all of mine they ate
I can’t stand human zombies in a trance with their phone
I can’t stand human beings wearing too much cologne
 
I can’t stand close talkers, people all in my face
Or people talkin in a movie, this is such a disgrace
Or people walking round town loud talkin their phone
I wanna get up in their face and say I do not condone
 
I hate sign stealin cheaters
One-up story tellers
Constant interrupters
BO body smellers
Because you’re driving me nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much
 
CHORUS

It happens every day, I can’t believe when I see
Someone refuse to cover their mouth when they have to sneeze
And What am I supposed to do – how am I supposed to breathe?
When someone says suppoably instead of supposedly

CHORUS

किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Thikasaniche maskat is a Konkani breakfast recipe. This is a very easy and simple recipe. It is made from wheat flour. It gets nice net and turns out crispy. You can also can this ghavane, or dhiradi or pole. This is a very healthy and quick recipe. It can be made from very few ingredients those are easily available in your pantry. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Wheat flour
• 1/4 tsp Cumin seeds
• 1/4 tsp Carom seeds / Ajwain
• Finely chopped Green chili
• 2 tsp shredded fresh Coconut
• 1/4 tsp Turmeric powder
• Salt to taste
• Water
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves
• Oil

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, cumin seeds, ajwain, green chili, fresh coconut, turmeric powder, 
  salt and mix everything well together. 
• Add a little water at a time to make a little runny batter like dosa batter. 
• No lumps of wheat flour should be formed. 
• Add coriander leaves and mix well. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil on it. 
• Mix the batter well once transfer on the pan. 
• Spread it little and roast until lower side gets nice golden color. 
• When lower side gets nice golden color spread a little oil on upper side and flip maskat over 
  carefully. 
• When lower side also gets nice golden color, transfer the masakt into a dish. 
• Thiksaniche maskat is all ready.
• You can serve maskat with coconut chutney.

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 3 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

localized.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 3 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
localized.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

Namaskaar Dosto, yeh ek bahut hi interesting video hai jaha pe maine share kiya ek quick shopping trip ka experience jaha pe late night achanak se plan bana Apple store se kuch shopping karne ka aur humne enjoy kiya Porsche Panamera ko aur Dubai mein late night isi Shopping Experience mein hum gaye Mall of the Emirates, jaha pe visit kiya Apple Store aur bahut se items purchase kiye. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko yeh video pasand aayegi.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1236 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
As Harman leaves the house, he saves Soumya from a deadly accident but injures himself. Will Soumya accept him? Catch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: TSG Jash Got Corona Free 💉 Vaccine || Special Message For TSG Army
snippet.description:
TSG Jash Got Corona Free 💉 Vaccine || Special Message For TSG Army 


#Twosidegamers
#Coronavaccine


To prevent the spread of COVID-19:
Clean your hands often. Use soap and water, or an alcohol-based hand rub.
Maintain a safe distance from anyone who is coughing or sneezing.
Wear a mask when physical distancing is not possible.
Don’t touch your eyes, nose or mouth.
Cover your nose and mouth with your bent elbow or a tissue when you cough or sneeze.
Stay home if you feel unwell.
If you have a fever, cough and difficulty breathing, seek medical attention.
Calling in advance allows your healthcare provider to quickly direct you to the right health facility. This protects you, and prevents the spread of viruses and other infections.
Masks
Masks can help prevent the spread of the virus from the person wearing the mask to others. Masks alone do not protect against COVID-19, and should be combined with physical distancing and hand hygiene. Follow the advice provided by your local health authority.

es.description:
Respire derecho para aumentar la inmunidad | Día 2 de 10 días de viaje de respiración y meditación con Gurudev
 Únase al viaje de 10 días de respiración y meditación en http://aoliv.in/10days

 Aprenda el ejercicio de respiración más poderoso del mundo haciendo el Taller en línea de meditación y respiración aquí: https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 La mayoría de las personas no saben que están usando solo el 33% de su capacidad pulmonar. Esto se puede aumentar aprendiendo la respiración yóguica o la respiración profunda. El día 2 del desafío de respiración y meditación, le traemos poderosos ejercicios de respiración que pueden mejorar su capacidad pulmonar para el oxígeno. La combinación de ejercicios de respiración y meditación revitalizará su cuerpo y relajará su mente.

 Optimice su capacidad de oxígeno aprendiendo el ejercicio de respiración y meditación más poderoso del mundo, Sudarshan Kriya en el Taller en línea de meditación y respiración: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 Acerca de Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

 Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar es un líder espiritual y humanitario de renombre mundial y un embajador de la paz y los valores humanos. A través de su vida y obra, Gurudev ha inspirado a millones de personas en todo el mundo con una visión de un mundo libre de estrés y sin violencia.
 Gurudev fundó The Art of Living, una organización sin fines de lucro que se dedica a iniciativas de servicio y manejo del estrés. Los programas diseñados por Gurudev empoderan a las personas con técnicas y herramientas para vivir una vida más profunda y feliz.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.title: सांस की तकलीफ बढ़ाने का अधिकार | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 2
hi.description:
सांस की तकलीफ बढ़ाने का अधिकार | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 2

 यहां ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप कर दुनिया के सबसे शक्तिशाली सांस लेने के व्यायाम को जानें:

 ज्यादातर लोग नहीं जानते कि वे अपने फेफड़ों की क्षमता का केवल 33% उपयोग कर रहे हैं। इसे योगिक श्वास या गहरी केंद्रित श्वास सीखकर बढ़ाया जा सकता है। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती के दिन 2 पर, हम आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाते हैं जो ऑक्सीजन के लिए आपके फेफड़ों की क्षमता को बढ़ा सकते हैं। साँस लेने के व्यायाम और ध्यान का संयोजन आपके शरीर को पुनर्जीवित करेगा और आपके दिमाग को आराम देगा।

 दुनिया में सबसे शक्तिशाली श्वास और ध्यान अभ्यास सीखकर अपनी ऑक्सीजन क्षमता का अनुकूलन करें, ऑनलाइन ध्यान और सांस लेने की क्रिया पर सुदर्शन क्रिया: a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

snippet.title: Roman Reigns Pummels Daniel Bryan With Chair In Front Of Cesaro | 1st May | WWE Smackdown
snippet.description:
After the WWE Universal Championship match between Roman Reigns and Daniel Bryan was over Cesaro proceeded to attack Reigns. Jey Uso then hit Cesaro and trapped him whereas Reigns took a chair and proceeded to hit Bryan with it while Uso held back Cesaro and made him watch it.
.
.

This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 3 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.title: मी या मुलीशी लग्न करणार आहे... | Maharashtrachi Hasya Jatra | 139-140 Episode | Highlights
snippet.description:
सोनी मराठीवरील 'महाराष्ट्राची हास्यजत्रा' हा कार्यक्रम सर्वांचे निखळ मनोरंजन करतो आहे. आजच्या कठीण परिस्थितीत हा कार्यक्रम  प्रेक्षकांच्या टेन्शनवरची मात्रा ठरतो आहे. राज्यात पुन्हा लॉकडाऊन झाल्यामुळे चित्रीकरण थांबले आहे, पण प्रेक्षकांचे मनोरंजन मात्र अबाधित राहिले आहे. प्रेक्षकांना फ्रेश एपिसोड्सची मेजवानी मिळतच होती आणि आता प्रेक्षकांच्या मनोरंजनाचा वसा घेतलेल्या हास्यजत्रेने राज्याबाहेर, दमणमध्ये चित्रीकरणाला सुरुवात केली आहे.
कॉमेडीचा चौकार, टेन्शन तडीपार - 'महाराष्ट्राची हास्यजत्रा' सोमवार ते गुरुवार रात्री ९ वा. सोनी मराठी वर आणि SONY LIV APP वर कधीही…

#MaharashtrachiHasyaJatra #SonyMarathi #MarathiKatta

VIDEO COURTESY: SONY MARATHI

snippet.title: Free Fire in Real Life😳🔥Criminal Chrono & Evil Kelly The Villain !!
snippet.description:
FreeFire's First Real Life Short Film in Indian Community.

This time we have done a live-action FreeFire shoot with the help of @Havok Nation - The Gamers Destination . 

VFX Artist - https://youtu.be/Ug_DsN61Q8U

Summary - The story of this video goes like this...
The Real Bounty Hunter Ayush was kidnapped by Super Villian and tried to erase his super skills and memory, Sanam somehow rescued Ayush but Supervillain tracked his location and tried to kill him again.

PC Mod and Shoot Exceccution by Havok Nation 
- https://www.instagram.com/havoknationin/
Shoot by Abhijeet Kalamkar and Vishal Jadhav
- https://www.instagram.com/abhijeet.k.photography/
- https://www.instagram.com/vishal8jadhav/
VFX by Jai Gurjar (Shortpants)
- https://www.instagram.com/shortpants_vfx/
Special Cast Kelly by Vijaya Singha
- https://www.instagram.com/vijaya_0717/

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.

snippet.title: Third Wave Confirmed | Tamil | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing the third wave of cases in India. Third-wave is inevitable, given the high levels at which this virus is circulating. But it is not clear at what time scale this Phase 3 will occur," Dr. K VijayRaghavan said at a government briefing. We will also be discussing the current situation in Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Kerala and Tamil Nadu.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3158 - Popatlal Ki Sansanikhez Khabar! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

snippet.description:

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 2 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Easy-ஆ English Katthukkalaam! Ft. Sivaangi & Pugazh | English Partner - The Language Hub
snippet.description:
இனி யாரு வேணாலும் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கலாம் WhatsApp-லயே!!

 ஒரு personal trainer உடைய உதவியோடு நீங்கள் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கலாம்.

- 2 மாதம் நம்முடைய course duration. 4 months practice. மொத்தமாக 6 மாத கோர்ஸ் validity.

- உங்க வயசும், படிப்பும் இங்க ஒரு தட கிடையாது.

- உலகத்துல எங்க இருந்தாலும் நீங்க உங்க free time-ல english கத்துக்கலாம்.

- நீங்க course முடிக்கர வரைக்கும் உங்களுக்கு personal trainer உடைய Support உங்களுக்கு இருக்கும்.

-நீங்கள் விரும்பும் நேரத்தில், நீங்கள் இருக்கும் இடத்திலிருந்தே கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம். 

- Life time validity 

Office: 54, Bharathi park, above icici bank, 7th cross road, saibaba colony, Coimbatore- 641035

Course பற்றி மேலும் அறிய கீழே கொடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ள லிங்க் கிளிக் செய்யவும்
https://wa.me/917010333320

snippet.title: திடீரென எதிர் வீட்டுக்கு சென்று திக்குமுக்காட வைத்த மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்|MK Stalin| DMK
snippet.description:
கோபாலபுரத்திலுள்ள தனது தாயாரை சந்தித்து வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றார் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்

தமிழகத்தில் திமுக ஆட்சியைக் கைப்பற்றியுள்ள நிலையில், தாயாரிடம் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் வாழ்த்து

தாயார் வீட்டுக்கு எதிரே இருந்த குடும்ப நண்பர் வீட்டுக்குச் சென்றும் வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றுக் கொண்டார்

ஸ்டாலின் திடீர் வருகையால் எதிர் வீட்டுக்காரர்கள் மகிழ்ச்சியில் திக்குமுக்காடினர்

snippet.title: Gaon ki yaad | गाँव की याद - Hansraj raghuwanshi
snippet.description:
भोलेनाथ सब अच्छा करेंगे 🙏

महामारी फैलने का एक ही कारण है - प्रकृति के साथ छेड़ छाड़ । जिसका भुगतान हम सब को करना पड़ रहा है। महामारी के शिकंजे में माता, पिता, भाई, बहन और छोटे छोटे बच्चे भी आ गए हैं। यह सब खबरें सुन कर ह्रदय बहुत दुखी होता है। आप सब से मेरी विनती है के आप सब अपना और अपनों का ख्याल रखें। भोले बाबा का नाम जप करते रहें और जो लोग इस सब का नाजायज़ फायदा उठा रहे हैं उनसे बचें और ऐसे मुश्किल समय में एक दूसरे के सहायक बनें।
जयशंकरमहाराज❤️

Singer : hansraj raghuwanshi 
Composer : hansraj raghuwanshi 
Lyrics : hansraj raghuwanshi 
Music : adamya sharma 
Poetry writer : Dinesh Samvat

snippet.title: Lockdown in Punjab: Failure of Punjab Government?
snippet.description:
🔹ਕੀ ਸੂਬੇ 'ਚ ਲੱਗਣ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਮੁਕੰਮਲ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ?
🔹ਪੰਜਾਬ 'ਚ ਲੱਗੇ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ਤੋਂ ਲੋਕਾਂ 'ਚ ਵੱਡੀ ਨਾਰਾਜ਼ਗੀ
🔹ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ ਵੀ ਲੋਕ ਸੜਕਾਂ 'ਤੇ
🔹ਇਹ ਕਿਹੋ ਜਿਹਾ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ ?

 Lockdown in Punjab: Failure of Punjab Government? As covid cases are increasing day by day, Punjab Government imposes strict guidelines to handle covid crisis. But in reality, these guidelines do not seem to properly impose in Punjab.  

#coronavirus #Punjab #PunjabLockdown #COVID19

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Lockdown Dobaara | Funcho
snippet.description:
The L’Oréal Paris 1.5% Hyaluronic Acid Serum contains Hyaluronic acid
which is a must have ingredient for the skin.

Buy this product from here: 
Amazon - https://amzn.to/3dBai5u
Nykaa - https://bit.ly/31QW2Ag
Flipkart - https://bit.ly/3s3jLYy
Myntra - https://bit.ly/2Oncchs

So here we are, back to those lockdown days.. Almost bhul hi gaye the ki wapis yaad aagaya wo din. Wo Dalgona coffee ka trend, wo Pubg ki raate, wo videocalls Ludo din bhar...
Lockdown wapis aa hi gaya toh uss par video bhi banana toh banta hai na??? 
Toh bana daala yeh video..
We hope you genuinely liked this video and if you did, LIKE SHARE COMMENT toh karna bhulna hi mat.

Stay home. Stay healthy and jitna ho sake logo ki madad karo. We are in a very bad
situation right now and together we can overcome this.
